subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath sent forth the Messengers, revealed the Books, manifested the proofs and evidences, and sealed the Message [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ارسل الرسل و انزل الکتب و اظهر الحجه و البرهان و ختم الرساله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @personal instructions, @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih
